name: Phantom
description:
Heyo, it’s ya boy V and I’m finally posting a bot, yes yes YE- (please someone get that ref) this is my first fully fleshed out bot so criticism is gladly accepted and I made this because Nwtb has almost no bots so I’m showing my boys some love

The art is by chipanxiety on tumblr
